title: PAIK Team
description: The group that owns a component, system, or environment. Deliberately thin: no roster of names/emails - the org's own people directory (HR system, Backstage, chat admin) stays the source of truth for who is on the team. See SPEC.md section 5.

description.description: One line: what this team owns/is responsible for

chat_channel.description: Chat channel name or URL, e.g. #team-orders or a Slack/Teams link

on_call_ref.description: Link to the team's on-call schedule (PagerDuty, Opsgenie, ...), or omit if the team has no on-call rotation

directory_ref.description: Optional link to the org's actual people directory/org chart for this team (Backstage, HR system, ...) - never embed names/emails here
